emails.subject: SWPC Agreement
emails.body: SWPC Agreement Kay I've reached a verbal agreement with Westinghouse on the LD issues. I've attached a letter outlining the agreement. Could you review from a legal standpoint? Call me with questions. Thanks, Mitch

emails.subject: Re: SWPC Agreement
emails.body: Re: SWPC Agreement Thanks for the info. I'll give it a look. Kay Enron North America Corp. From: Mitch Robinson 11/09/2000 06:05 PM

emails.subject: Re: SWPC Agreement
emails.body: Kay We are selling both the Wheatland and Gleason facilities, so along with the agreement below, I've attached a letter that we could show potential purchasers. Thoughts? Time is critical, since we are right now in negotiations with purchasers, so please let me know if I need to forward on to someone else. Thanks, Mitch Kay Mann 11/10/2000 09:56 AM
